info.description: This is the set of APIs to control the doctor-facing functionalities of ConnectCare
info.title: Bifrost APIs for ConnectCare Doctors

tags.name: viewing
tags.description: Important for tracking status of appointments and displaying appointments to the doctor

tags.name: consulting
tags.description: Important to perform different functions during a consultation - applicable to upcoming and ongoing

tags.name: medical_data
tags.description: Important to exchange information such as case details, advice and prescriptions

post.description: This is the method used to book a cross consultation for an ongoing appointment

start.description: UTC date and time at which the appointment is scheduled to start in format yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss

end.description: UTC date and time at which the appointment is scheduled to end in format yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss

400.description: Could not refer for cross consult

post.description: This is the method used to authenticate the new user by email address and password

get.description: This method is used to get case details, like photos uploaded, files uploaded, and retrieved case sheets
This method returns the different appointment types which can be passed in field "type" in POST /api/tele/emr/appointment/create

200.description: Successfully retrieved list of appointment types

post.description: This method books an appointment in ConnectCare for the patient as per the specifications provided

422.description: Error encountered when booking an appointment due to the combination of input parameters

error.description: Explains the reason for the error

post.description: This method should be used to upload a new file - image or pdf. To be called after booking appointment.

422.description: Server side failure in uploading data, could be due to incorrect unique identifier

get.description: This method lists all appointment details based on the "status" specified. There are 4 categories of appointments for a doctor - upcoming, ongoing, missed, completed.

parameters.name: tenant_id
parameters.description: API key provided to the organization

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Email address of the consultant, if search for specific doctor

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: The status of appointments to be filtered. "upcoming", "ongoing", "completed", "missed", "all" can be passed

parameters.name: search_tags
parameters.description: Json-encoded object of key-value pairs for search

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: From date in specified timezone, e.g. 2020-10-19

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: To date in specified timezone, e.g. 2020-10-21

parameters.name: timezone
parameters.description: IANA timezone in which dates are specified, e.g. Asia/Kolkata

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number like 1, 2, 3, .... as maximum limit of number of appointments displayed is 25 per page

get.description: This method list number of appointments in each of the 4 categories of appointments for a doctor - upcoming, ongoing, missed, completed.

parameters.name: tenant_id
parameters.description: API key provided to the organization

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Email address of the consultant, if search for specific doctor

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: The status of appointments to be filtered. "upcoming", "ongoing", "completed", "missed", "all" can be passed

parameters.name: search_tags
parameters.description: Any of the values from key-value pairs you have passed in tags for specific search

200.description: List of appointment counts retrieved successfully

post.description: This method is used to mark upcoming appointments as ongoing. This is to be used to check-in the patient. A phone call will automatically be placed between doctor and patient in case of "phone_only" set as true.
This method is used to reconnect the doctor and the patient over the phone through masked number. ONLY applicable for ongoing appointments (once started).

400.description: Bad request call could not be placed successfully

get.description: This method is used to get the different followup types as options to select from in medical advice.

200.description: List of possible advice types retrieved successfully

500.description: Failed to retrieve the list of types due to technical error

post.description: This method is used to upload files that doctor would like to link to the casesheet at checkout.
This method is used to mark ongoing appointment as completed. Medical advice to be passed in this stage to create follow-up action automatically.
This method is used to issue the prescription to the patient. This must be issued within 12 hours of completing the appointment

422.description: Signature not uploaded by the doctor in ConnectCare app

email.description: Email address of the consultant you are referring to for cross consult

request_id.description: Identifier for the existing appointment that is in progress

duration.description: Duration for the cross consult appointment in minutes

raw_data.description: Base64-encoded raw data of the file

id.description: Unique identifier for file upload - PASS WHAT IS RETURNED AS "id" WHEN APPOINTMENT IS BOOKED

file_data.description: Base64-encoded raw data of the file

medical_record.description: Page displaying case details extracted from EMR

medical_history.description: Page displaying files uploaded by patient or collected from homecare diagnostics

triage.description: Page displaying photos uploaded by the patient

issued_on.description: UTC date time at which prescription was issued

route.description: Both eyes | Right eye | Left eye | Per oral | Topical | Per nasal | Per right nasal | Per left nasal | Intravenous

generic_name.description: Name of the medicine for patient's reference (including generic name)

notes.description: Any special instructions or side effects to inform the patient

order.description: Index representing course number, like course 1, 2 , 3, etc.

timings.description: Frequency at which medicine is to be taken in the specified duration. E.g. every 2 day(s), 2 time(s) a day.

unit.description: The unit of the dosage or duration. For dosage, e.g. mg, drop(s) or null (in case of ointments). For duration, e.g. day(s), week(s), etc or "SOS".

value.description: The value of the dosage or duration. For dosage, e.g. 200 in case of 200 mg or 2 in case of 2 drops(s). For duration, e.g. 2 in case of 2 day(s). Pass value as -1 in case of no specific value.

tenant_id.description: API key provided to the organization

casesheet.description: Format specific to organization (shared over email)

consent_taken.description: Whether doctor took consent from the patient

prescription_required.description: Doctor has indicated whether prescription is needed

case_history.description: Case history entered by doctor for appointment

plan_of_management.description: Plan of management notes entered by doctor for appointment

examination.description: Notes on examination done for patient during appointment

local_consult.description: Advice on any local consults needed

time.description: Very specific format of "After x day(s)", "After x week(s)", "After x months(s)", "After x years(s)" where x is a number. Appointment will be booked after the specified time.

tenant_id.description: API key provided to the organization

pages.description: Total number of pages of appointments with this status and search criteria

request_id.description: Identifier for the appointment to be stored and passed for any subsequent action on the appointment

start.description: UTC date time for start of appointment

end.description: UTC date time for end of appointment

phone.description: Mobile number to reach the patient

source.description: What medium was used to book the appointment

phone_only.description: Call medium for appointment, i.e. whether phone call only or video call

gender.description: Gender of the patient, e.g. F, M, O

prescription_required.description: If appointment is complete, this shows if doctor marked that prescription is needed.

prescription_issued.description: If appointment is complete, this shows if doctor has issued the prescription.

status.description: Status of the appointment - "upcoming" for confirmed appointents & "pending" for appointments pending payment

pages.description: Total number of pages of appointemnts

start.description: UTC date time for start of appointment

end.description: UTC date time for end of appointment

display.description: Display information of appointment slot to present to end user

payment_link.description: Payment link on which patient should make payment

phone.description: Mobile number on which patient is to be contacted. NOTE - Reports and prescriptions will be sent on this number.

tenant_id.description: API key provided to the organization

date.description: Date on which appointment is needed in format yyyy-MM-dd

timezone.description: IANA timezone code in which you are specifying the date. Default is "Asia/Kolkata".

locale.description: ISO code for locale from which request is coming to allow for appointment confirmation data to be displayed in easily readable format. Default is "en-IN".

currency.description: The 3-letter code for currency in which patient is to be charged. This is REQUIRED if "type" field is not provided.

amount.description: Amount to be charged to the patient for the appointment. This is REQUIRED if "type" field is not provided.

reason.description: Single line of free text summarizing need for appointment mentioned by patient

type.description: The appointment type to be updated when booking. This is REQUIRED if "amount" and "currency" fields are not provided.

phone_only.description: Indicator of whether the appointment will be a phone call (TRUE) or a video call (FALSE)

languages.description: Array of 2-letter language codes which shows patient's preferred languages

tags.description: Key-value pairs passed by organization for customized search

dob.description: date of birth of the patient

gender.description: gender of the patient. F - female, M - male, O - other

email.description: Email Id belong to whitelisted domain. This domain can be checked on GET /api/tele/organizations.

department.description: Department in which appointment is to be booked. This needs to be one of the options from GET /api/tele/departments.
